title: Karthakk system
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Maramere system}} {{System |image=[[File:Karthakk_bloodlight.jpg]] |name=Karthakk system |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Karthakk sector/Legends|Karthakk sector]] |coordinates=Q-17 |xyz= |quadrants=*[[Bloodlight Sea]] *[[The Canyon]] *[[Corsairian Crescent]] *[[Crimson Talon]] *[[Lurid Dawn]] *[[Mercenaries' Ridge]] *[[Mid-Point]] *[[Nym's Hovel]] *[[Rebellion Blaze (quadrant)|Rebellion Blaze]] *[[Solar Phoenix 2]] *[[Umber Scale]] *[[Voria's Ember]] |suns=[[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]] |orbits=#[[Lok/Legends|Lok]] #*[[Khons]] #[[Maramere]] #[[Nod Kartha]] |stations=*[[Alliance Station I (Karthakk system)|Alliance Station I]]''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' *[[Blood Razors outpost]] *[[Empire's Station I (Karthakk system)|Empire's Station I]] *[[Lok Station]] *[[Spacestation 1138]] *[[Trade Federation Center]] |asteroids=[[Spine of Lok]] |comets= |nebulae=*[[Censorious Tempest Nebula]] *[[Ruby Nebula]] |routes= |other= |species=[[Mere]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |population= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] }} {{Quote|I'm here to investigate the Trade Federation presence. We believe that they're conducting an illegal operation in this system.''"
"''Nice of you to finally notice. The Neimoidians have been looting the system for ten years!|[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''}} The '''Karthakk system''', also known as '''Maramere system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], containing planets including [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], [[Nod Kartha]], and the [[Maramere]] homeworld of the sentient [[Mere]] species. It centered on the star [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]]. Prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] occupied the system, using it as a testing ground for its new [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]]. The local pirate [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], operating out of a base on Lok, fought back against the Federation, though in the process was forced to abandon his outpost to the enemy. Nym continued to battle the Federation for control of the Karthakk system for the next ten years, and, with the help of [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], eventually seized his base back from the droid forces. After this event, Adi Gallia was appointed as Nym's Personal [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Advisor of the Karthakk System to help stabilize the inhabitants of Maramere and Lok from the Trade Federation's occupation. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Karthakk system became a battleground once more. Aboard [[Drama Korr's space yacht]] above Maramere, Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] fought the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]]. After an arduous duel, Anakin trapped Durge inside an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], and blasted him into the system's star, Karthakk. In the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] was performing test launches of its escape pods in the Karthakk system when the pirate group [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] attacked, forcing the consular ship to abandon its pods as it fled. The droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] were later discovered to have been aboard one of those pods. As of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Nym had established a fortress on Lok, from which he kept watch over the Karthakk system and raided the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}} *[[Starfighter: Crossbones 1|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 1]]
